  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Identifies one conceptual issue (the first observation is not an observation) and proposes a tighter framing, partially supported.",

    "R1.4": "Names one prior work (constrained reinforcement learning robustness literature) and articulates the delta.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (generalization beyond power-systems applications).",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (overclaiming on contribution).",
    "RX.5": "Output blends sources without traceability."

rationale.R1.1: Identifies one conceptual issue (the first observation is not an observation) and proposes a tighter framing, partially supported.
rationale.R1.2: Engages the argument chain but does not walk end-to-end; flags every load-bearing inconsistency is not done.
rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work (constrained reinforcement learning robustness literature) and articulates the delta.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (generalization beyond power-systems applications).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (overclaiming on contribution).
